# Scale Company

Scale Company is a digital marketing company based in Vila Velha, Espirito Santo, Brazil.
The site publishes service pages and educational content about SEO, paid traffic, website creation, landing pages, social media and legal marketing.

## Primary SEO Pages

- Home: https://www.scalecompany.com.br/
- Services hub: https://www.scalecompany.com.br/servicos
- Paid traffic: https://www.scalecompany.com.br/servicos/trafego-pago
- Website creation: https://www.scalecompany.com.br/servicos/criacao-de-sites
- SEO consulting: https://www.scalecompany.com.br/servicos/consultoria-seo
- Landing pages: https://www.scalecompany.com.br/servicos/criacao-de-landing-pages
- Social media management: https://www.scalecompany.com.br/servicos/gestao-redes-sociais

## Local SEO Pages

- Marketing agency in Vila Velha: https://www.scalecompany.com.br/vila-velha
- Paid traffic in Vila Velha: https://www.scalecompany.com.br/vila-velha/trafego-pago
- SEO in Vila Velha: https://www.scalecompany.com.br/vila-velha/seo
- Website creation in Vila Velha: https://www.scalecompany.com.br/vila-velha/criacao-de-sites
- Legal marketing in Vila Velha: https://www.scalecompany.com.br/vila-velha/marketing-juridico
- Google Ads for lawyers in Vila Velha: https://www.scalecompany.com.br/vila-velha/google-ads-para-advogados
- Website creation in Vitoria: https://www.scalecompany.com.br/vitoria/criacao-de-sites

## Blog Topics

- Legal marketing and OAB-compliant digital advertising
- SEO local for lawyers and local companies
- Paid traffic metrics, CPA, CPL and ROAS
- Professional websites and landing pages for lead generation
